c.d: How intuitive and simple the app is to navigate and create collages.
The number and diversity of pre-designed collage templates available.
The range of tools and features for personalizing collages (e.g., filters, stickers, text options).
The presence and effectiveness of AI-powered tools for automatic collage generation and editing.
Whether the app is available on iOS, Android, or Web.
The balance between free and paid features, and the value offered in the free version.
c.s: User reviews, Editor reviews, App description
